tools.title: Bitcoin Tools
tools.subtitle: Powerful tools to help you understand Bitcoin markets, plan your investment strategy, and validate addresses.
tools.priceConverterDesc: Convert between Bitcoin, satoshi, and major fiat currencies (USD, EUR, JPY, GBP, CNY, CHF, INR, BRL) using real-time exchange rates.
tools.marketDataDesc: Real-time Bitcoin price data, market statistics, halving countdown, price charts, and transaction fee estimates.
tools.dcaSimulatorDesc: Compare Dollar Cost Averaging (DCA) vs Lump Sum investment strategies with historical and projected performance analysis.
tools.bip39SeedDesc: Generate or manually create mnemonic seed phrases (12 or 24 words) with autocomplete validation from the official wordlist.
tools.addressValidatorDesc: Validate Bitcoin addresses and identify their type: Legacy (1...), SegWit (3...), or Native SegWit (bc1...).
tools.btcTreasuriesDesc: View the Top 20 Bitcoin treasury public companies.
tools.xpubGeneratorDesc: Derive Bitcoin addresses from an extended public key (xpub).
tools.blockExplorerDesc: Look up any Bitcoin transaction, block, or address using the mempool.space API.
tools.paymentUriDesc: Generate BIP21 Bitcoin payment URIs and QR codes with amount, label and message.
tools.paymentMonitorDesc: Watch a Bitcoin address for incoming payments in real time with live confirmation tracking.
tools.checkoutCreatorDesc: Build a shareable payment page with QR code and voice readout that you can send to anyone.
tools.etfComparisonDesc: Compare Bitcoin spot ETF holdings against public treasury companies side by side.
tools.portfolioTrackerDesc: Track your Bitcoin ETF and treasury company holdings with live P&L and BTC exposure.
tools.marketSignalsDesc: 6 on-chain and sentiment indicators (Fear & Greed, Mayer Multiple, 200WMA, Pi Cycle, Golden Ratio, MA Cross) with a composite buy/sell score.
tools.newsCrawlerDesc: Aggregate Bitcoin news from 10+ RSS sources. Filter by date, category, and source. Export as Markdown.
tools.securityWarningDesc: When using Bitcoin tools, always follow these security best practices:
tools.securityTip1: Always verify Bitcoin addresses before sending funds - double-check characters, especially at the beginning and end of the address
tools.securityTip2: Never share your private keys, seed phrases, or wallet passwords with anyone
tools.securityTip3: Use trusted, open-source software and verify downloads from official sources
tools.securityTip4: Be aware that some tools are for educational purposes only - use production-grade tools for real transactions
tools.securityTip5: Consider using hardware wallets (cold wallets) for storing significant amounts of Bitcoin
tools.securityTip6: Keep your software and wallets updated with the latest security patches
tools.securityTip7: Double-check transaction amounts and recipient addresses before confirming

addressValidator.title: Bitcoin Address Validator
addressValidator.subtitle: Validate Bitcoin addresses and identify their type
addressValidator.label: Bitcoin Address
addressValidator.securityWarningDesc: When working with Bitcoin addresses, always follow these security best practices:
addressValidator.securityTip1: Always verify addresses before sending funds - double-check specially characters in the beginning and end of the address
addressValidator.securityTip2: Be aware that bech32 addresses (starting with bc1 or tb1) are case-sensitive
addressValidator.securityTip3: Watch out for typos or address manipulation attacks - malicious software can swap addresses
addressValidator.securityTip4: Never share private keys or seed phrases with anyone
addressValidator.securityTip5: Consider using cold wallets for generating and managing addresses securely
addressValidator.securityTip6: Understand that address reuse can compromise privacy - use new addresses for each transaction when possible
addressValidator.typeP2PKH: Pay-to-Public-Key-Hash (P2PKH) address. The original Bitcoin address format.
addressValidator.typeP2SH: Pay-to-Script-Hash (P2SH) address. Supports Segregated Witness (SegWit) wrapped in P2SH.
addressValidator.typeP2WPKH: Pay-to-Witness-Public-Key-Hash (P2WPKH) address. Native Segregated Witness format with lower transaction fees.
addressValidator.typeP2WSH: Pay-to-Witness-Script-Hash (P2WSH) address. Native SegWit script format.
addressValidator.typeP2TR: Pay-to-Taproot (P2TR) address. The newest and most efficient Bitcoin address format with enhanced privacy.

bip39Seed.securityTip1: Generate seed phrases offline using trusted software
bip39Seed.securityTip2: Never share your seed phrase with anyone
bip39Seed.securityTip3: Store your seed phrase securely and never store it digitally
bip39Seed.securityTip4: This client-side tool is for demonstration only

xpubGenerator.title: xPub Address Generator
xpubGenerator.subtitle: Paste an extended public key to derive Bitcoin receiving addresses.
xpubGenerator.placeholder: Paste any extended public key (xpub, ypub, zpub, tpub, upub, vpub…)
xpubGenerator.invalidXpub: Invalid key. Please check and try again.
xpubGenerator.exampleNote: These are test vectors derived from a known seed — safe to use for exploration.
xpubGenerator.securityTip1: xpub keys expose your entire receiving address history — never share them unless you trust the recipient
xpubGenerator.securityTip2: An xpub cannot spend funds, but it can compromise your privacy
xpubGenerator.securityTip3: For watch-only wallets, use zpub (native SegWit) or xpub (legacy) depending on your wallet software
xpubGenerator.securityTip4: This tool runs entirely in your browser — no keys are transmitted to any server

paymentUri.subtitle: Build a BIP21 Bitcoin payment URI and QR code to request a payment.
paymentUri.label: Label
paymentUri.labelHint: Displayed as the recipient name in the sender's wallet.
paymentUri.messageHint: A note about the purpose of the payment.
paymentUri.invalidAmount: Amount must be a positive number up to 21,000,000 BTC.
paymentUri.bip21Info: Payment URIs follow the BIP21 standard, supported by all major Bitcoin wallets. See the spec:
paymentUri.uriPlaceholder: Fill in a valid address to generate the URI.
paymentUri.qrHint: Scan with any Bitcoin wallet to pre-fill the payment.

portfolioTracker.title: Portfolio Tracker
portfolioTracker.subtitle: Track your Bitcoin ETF and treasury company holdings with live P&L and BTC exposure.
portfolioTracker.emptySubtitle: Add your first ETF or treasury company position to start tracking.
portfolioTracker.formInvalidShares: Enter a valid number of shares greater than 0.
portfolioTracker.formInvalidCost: Enter a valid cost per share greater than 0.
portfolioTracker.etfNavNote: Current value is estimated from this ETF's BTC-per-share ratio × live BTC price. It approximates the NAV.
portfolioTracker.companyNote: Current value uses the company's BTC holdings as a proportion of its market cap × live BTC price. Actual stock price may differ.
portfolioTracker.btcNote: Current value is estimated directly from your BTC amount × live BTC price.
portfolioTracker.disclaimer: Portfolio data is stored locally in your browser and never sent to any server. Values are estimates based on BTC price and may not reflect actual market prices.
